info.name: NextEra Dev - Contact Form API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for NextEra Dev Contact Form API endpoints. Includes health check, contact form submission, and bulk email functionality.

request.description: Check if the API server is running and healthy.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "phone": "+1 (555) 123-4567",
  "budget": "$5000 - $10000",
  "services": ["Web Development", "UI/UX Design"],
  "message": "Hello, I am interested in your web development services. I would like to discuss a project idea."
}

request.description:
Submit a new contact form request. All fields are required.

Request body fields:
- name (string): Submitter's full name
- email (string): Submitter's email address
- phone (string): Contact phone number
- budget (string): Project budget range
- services (string or array): Services of interest
- message (string): Detailed message about the project

Send bulk emails to multiple recipients.

Request body fields:
- emails (array): Array of email addresses to send to (required, must not be empty)
- subject (string): Email subject line (required)
- text (string): Plain text version of email body (required)
- html (string): HTML version of email body (optional)
